title: Incorrect case folding in the LIKE operator
key_bug_features: Incorrect case comparison in LIKE operator
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_case (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL COLLATE NOCASE);
SELECT value FROM test_case WHERE value LIKE 'ね';
SELECT value FROM test_case WHERE value LIKE 'き';
SELECT value FROM test_case WHERE value LIKE char(0x304d);
